metadata.name: Request a Copy of a Birth Certificate

description: A citizen needs to order a certified copy of their birth certificate.

nodes.task_description: Gather the citizen's identifying information (full name, date of birth, parents' names).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent collects the necessary data to locate the vital record.

nodes.task_description: Verify the citizen's identity and eligibility to receive the document.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully verifies the citizen's identity against provided documentation.

nodes.task_description: Process the request and payment, and inform the citizen of the processing and mailing time.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent takes payment and submits the order for the certificate.
